title: mapImageLoader
description:
A plugin that allows loading images onto Minecraft maps directly from Google Drive, automatically resizing them to fit the map.
You can also upload photos from any other sources that provide a direct link.
body:
This plugin allows you to load images onto Minecraft maps directly via Google Drive.
It automatically scales images to fit map size on server startup and restores them after restarts.
Future updates will include filtering of inappropriate content (e.g., NSFW/pornographic material).

/loadimagemap url
to upload an image from Google drive to a map(you need an abbreviated link that you can make here [https://lonedev6.github.io/gddl/](https://lonedev6.github.io/gddl/))
You can also upload photos from any other sources that provide a direct link.

/loadimagemap image-name
uploads the image to the map from the plugins/camera folder
